1997.tagline: Tides of tranquility tested in Kuwait
narrative: In 1997, Kuwait was ravaged by a devastating flood that left a lasting impact on the country.
The disaster resulted in the unfortunate loss of 2 lives, with the estimated damage totaling $0.
This event served as a poignant reminder of the power of nature and the importance of preparedness and resilience.

2018.tagline: Tides of tranquility tested in Kuwait
narrative: In 2018, Kuwait faced a devastating flood that claimed the life of a single individual.
The disaster caused no reported economic damage, but left a lasting impact on the affected community.
The flood served as a stark reminder of the importance of disaster preparedness and emergency response in the region.
